---
title: "2 Week2---Portfolio"
author: "Yanxi Ren"
published: January 27th
---

In the following section, I will introduce the **OLI sensor**, which is the primary payload onboard the **Landsat 8 and 9** satellites.

```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(xaringanExtra)
xaringanExtra::embed_xaringan(url = "week2/Xaringan/YR_presentation_2.html",
                              ratio = "16:9")
```
